quiz.question:
White plays Qa4. It seems to go backwards and doesn't really make any progress. 

If White doesn't threaten anything, what's the right plan?

feedback.text: Rxe4 is a threat. You have to keep your rook safe!

answers.comment: targeting the c3 pawn with the knight and rook.

feedback.text: This move drops Rxe4. If your queen recaptures, the white queen takes on d7.

distractors.comment: bringing the last piece into the action.
